admin.portalSubtitle: Access the admin portal to manage users, organizations, properties, and more.

exhibitionInterests.title: Exhibition interest
exhibitionInterests.subtitle: Public registrations from the exhibition page: visitor or exhibitor, optional sponsorship package, and the organization record created for approval.
exhibitionInterests.subtitleUnified: Exhibition registrations and marketplace sponsorship review in one list. When a pending sponsorship exists for the same organization, verify organization and user here, then activate. Rows labeled marketplace-only have no exhibition registration.
exhibitionInterests.howToSeeVerification: For organizations in PENDING_APPROVAL or SPONSORSHIP_PENDING when there is no pending marketplace sponsorship application for that org in the list, use Verify registrant contact, then Verify organization here. When a pending marketplace sponsorship exists for the same org, the sponsorship verification columns and actions apply instead.
exhibitionInterests.cellNoPendingSponsorship: No actions: organization is not pending exhibition approval and there is no pending marketplace sponsorship for this organization.
exhibitionInterests.exhibitionLeadVerifyContactHint: Confirm this email/phone matches your checks, then mark contact verified.
exhibitionInterests.rejectExhibitionOrganizationHint: The linked organization will be marked rejected.
exhibitionInterests.verifyContactDialogEmailHint: The user will sign in with this email: {email}
exhibitionInterests.verifyContactDialogPasswordHint: At least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and a number. Share it securely with the registrant.
exhibitionInterests.rowMarketplaceOnlyHint: No exhibition registration for this organization — review sponsorship below.
exhibitionInterests.marketplaceSponsorshipSubtitle: Pending real-estate sponsorship applications: verify the organization and contact, then activate. Organizations in review are hidden from public APIs until approved or rejected.

admin.pickLocationHint: Click on the map to set the address location. Latitude and longitude will be saved.
admin.orgFormCreateSubtitle: Company profile, compliance, and contact — use the tabs below.
admin.orgFormCreateDocumentUploadHint: Document file uploads appear after you register the organization: submit this form with the required fields (for example, name and type). This dialog stays open so you can upload next. You can paste document URLs in the fields below anytime.
admin.orgFormEditSubtitle: Update any tab, then save. Document uploads apply in edit mode.

displaySettings.title: Display settings
displaySettings.subtitle: Control how long sponsor content stays on screen on the public home page (carousel and side ads).
displaySettings.sponsorCarouselHint: Time between slides in the top sponsor carousel.
displaySettings.sidebarMediaHint: When a sponsor has multiple images or videos, how long each one shows before switching.
displaySettings.sidebarLayoutHint: How often the left and right side columns advance to the next sponsors.
displaySettings.exhibitionSponsorshipPackages: Show sponsorship packages on exhibition page
displaySettings.exhibitionSponsorshipPackagesHint: When enabled, visitors see the pricing and benefits section (active packages from the database). When disabled, that block and its footer link are hidden.
displaySettings.exhibitionSponsorshipPackagePrices: Show package prices on exhibition page
displaySettings.exhibitionSponsorshipPackagePricesHint: When enabled, listed base prices appear on each package card and in the details modal. When disabled, benefits and enquiry still show; prices are hidden.

hero.dateVenue: 10–13 November 2026 — Addis Convention Center — Addis Ababa, Ethiopia
hero.subtitle: Meet global visionaries, explore iconic projects, and unlock pathways to growth and collaboration at the region's biggest real estate and construction show.

whyExhibit.title: Inspire industry leaders at the exhibition
whyExhibit.body: Showcase your vision alongside global influencers and decision-makers. Connect with institutional investors, developers, and government bodies driving the future of construction and real estate.
whyExhibit.bullet1: Unmatched access to high-value projects and partnerships
whyExhibit.bullet2: Elevate your presence through sponsorship opportunities
whyExhibit.bullet3: Conferences, networking sessions, and investor programs

whyVisit.title: Explore the future of living at the region's largest real estate event
whyVisit.body: Immerse yourself in groundbreaking urban innovations and connect with global real estate leaders.

brochureStrip.title: Event brochure
brochureStrip.intro: Open the print-ready overview in a new tab. Use your browser’s Print dialog to save as PDF or print copies for your team.

planning.title: We're planning an exhibition for the industry
planning.body: A dedicated platform where real estate companies, contractors, suppliers, and consultants can showcase their projects and products to buyers, investors, and partners.
planning.whoShowcases: Exhibitors include developers, contractors, architects, building materials and finishing suppliers, and service providers — all under one roof.

featuredListings.subtext: Browse a selection of properties from our platform. More listings and exhibitor content coming with the event.
featuredListings.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, city or company...

whatHappened.title: What to expect at the exhibition
whatHappened.subtitle: Three reasons to be part of the region's leading real estate and construction event.
whatHappened.card1Body: Latest launches, visionary masterplans, and breakthrough developments — all under one roof. Real estate and construction leaders showcasing the future of the industry.
whatHappened.card2Body: Connect with investors, developers, and city leaders through curated networking. Unlock new capital, forge partnerships, and expand in the markets that matter.
whatHappened.card3Body: Actionable insights from industry leaders — on trends reshaping how we live, invest, and build. Conferences and sessions designed for the market.

keyShowFeatures.title: Key show features
keyShowFeatures.subtitle: World-class conferences, major announcements, developer programme, and specialised tracks.
keyShowFeatures.intro: Whether you exhibit or visit, here's what's in it for you.
keyShowFeatures.exploreMoreHint: Discover the investors, developers, contractors and decision-makers you'll meet — and how to get involved.

whoAttends.title: Who attends
whoAttends.subtitle: The event brings together real estate leaders — investors, developers, architects, government officials, and home buyers.

valueChain.title: Construction value chain
valueChain.subtitle: We cover the entire spectrum of the industry. Find the niche that matters to your business.

pillar.title: Connect with industry leaders
pillar.subtitle: Discover the latest innovations and high-level networking that drives the sector forward.
pillar.expandBusinessDesc: Establish new partnerships and grow your network in the rapidly expanding market.
pillar.showcaseProductsDesc: Display your latest innovations to thousands of potential customers and decision-makers.
pillar.meetBuyersDesc: Connect directly with procurement managers, architects, and developers.
pillar.generateLeadsDesc: Fill your pipeline with high-value contacts and real business opportunities.

testimonial.title: World-class leaders building the future
testimonial.quote: The exhibition is a perfect destination for international investors to meet and exchange ideas and explore how they can develop their own product and the wider market.
testimonial.author: Industry Leader

planVisit.title: Plan your trip
planVisit.body: Join us for an event that pushes the boundaries of what's possible in real estate and urban development.

cta.title: Ready to join the leaders?
cta.body: Book your stand or register to visit the most anticipated real estate and construction event of the year.
